tool_args.label: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan listing recurring agenda items, specific agenda items, and anticipated information items by month

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - January 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Results - May 2025

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators.
The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Summer of 2025.
The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2025.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work Programs - November 2025 (Switch Installations in West Side Yard)

payload.description: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.

tool_args.label: Approval of 2026 Committee Work Plan - December 2025

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

payload.claim_text: Recurring agenda items at each LIRR Committee meeting include: Approval of Minutes, Committee Work Plan, President's Report, Operations Report, Safety Report, MTA Police Report, Action Items, Information Items, Finance Reports, and Procurements.
payload.subject: LIRR Committee recurring agenda

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements

payload.claim_text: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.
payload.subject: Adopted/Financial Plan 2025

payload.claim_text: Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.
payload.subject: Diversity & EEO Report

tool_args.label: Fall Track Work Programs - Main Line Second Track and East Side Access

payload.claim_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
payload.subject: Fall Track Work Programs

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work Programs - Switch Installations in West Side Yard

payload.claim_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
payload.subject: Winter Track Work Programs

tool_args.label: LIRR Committee is part of LIRR governance

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee oversees the MTA Long Island Rail Road as described in the committee work plan.

tool_args.label: MTA Police reports to LIRR Committee

payload.description: MTA Police provides a monthly Police Report to the Long Island Rail Road Committee as a recurring agenda item.

tool_args.label: Committee Work Plan describes meeting agenda items

payload.description: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review.
